occupation_title: Rotary Drill Operators, Oil and Gas
occupation_definition: Set up or operate a variety of drills to remove underground oil and gas, or remove core samples for testing during oil and gas exploration. Excludes “Earth Drillers, Except Oil and Gas” (47-5023).
